title: Melody's Blood Red XP Orbs
description: A simple texture pack for red experience obs. ~
body:
A simple texture pack for red experience obs. ~


• Important!: There are two versions. V1 is the main one and V2 looks better without shaders. Take the one you want from the main zipped file and place it in the resourcepacks folder
• For 1.16.2+
• [​Requires Optifine]
